channel.title: Notes from the Bench — Guild Atelier
channel.description: Recent observations from teaching, coaching, and product development.

item.title: What Happens When the Teacher Isn't in the Room
item.description: A student gets two hours of class a week and 166 hours without it. The real bottleneck is feedback, not motivation.

item.title: Good English Isn't the Same as Effective Workplace Communication
item.description: Meetings demand a different skill set than the one most English classes teach.
